title: helixanthera brevicalyx var. hayatae
intro: Helixanthera brevicalyx var. hayatae, also known as the Taiwanese dwarf mistletoe or Taiwania dwarf mistletoe, is a parasitic plant species native to Taiwan. Traditionally, Helixanthera brevicalyx var. hayatae has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and antitussive properties. It is often prepared as a tea or decoction for consumption, and has also been used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
